Package.Name: lsd
Package.Summary: The next generation ls command
Package.Description: The next generation ls command with a lot of pretty colors and icons.

Package.Name: python-rx
Package.Summary: Reactive extensions for Python
Package.Description: A library for composing asynchronous and event-based programs using observable collections and query operator functions in Python

Package.Name: python-humanfriendly
Package.Summary: Human friendly input/output for text interfaces using Python
Package.Description: Human friendly input/output in Python. The functions and classes in the humanfriendly package can be used to make text interfaces more user friendly.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: slaze-grub-theme
Package.Summary: Slaze grub theme
Package.Description: This is Slaze grub2 theme. Use grub-customizer to use or change the theme.

Package.Name: python-capturer
Package.Summary: Easily capture stdout/stderr of the current process and subprocesses
Package.Description: The capturer package makes it easy to capture the stdout and stderr streams of the current process and subprocesses. Output can be relayed to the terminal in real time but is also available to the Python program for additional processing.

Package.Name: font-caskaydia-cove-nerd-mono-ttf
Package.Summary: Patched version of Cascadia Code
Package.Description: Patched version of Cascadia Code

Package.Name: budgie-showtime-applet
Package.Summary: Applet displaying date and time on the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: Budgie Showtime is a digital desktop clock, showing time, and optionally, date. Text color of both can be set separately from the applet's menu.

Package.Name: font-caskaydia-cove-nerd-ttf
Package.Summary: Patched version of Cascadia Code
Package.Description: Patched version of Cascadia Code

Package.Name: budgie-workspace-stopwatch-applet
Package.Summary: Workspace usage tracker for the budgie desktop
Package.Description: Workspace Stopwatch Applet keeps track of usage per workspace, i.e. to find out how much minutes/hours were actually spent on a job. Workspaces can be freely named, custom names and all data are remembered.

Package.Name: budgie-workspace-wallpaper-applet
Package.Summary: Applet providing per workspace wallpaper
Package.Description: The workspace wallpaper applet shows a different wallpaper on each of the workspaces. Usage is simple; add the applet to the panel and set wallpapers on each of the workspaces in the way you are used to. The applet will remember what wallpaper was set on each of the workspaces.

Package.Name: python-pikepdf
Package.Summary: A Python library for reading and writing PDF, powered by qpdf
Package.Description: Pikepdf is a Python library for reading and writing PDF files.

Package.Name: pytest-asyncio
Package.Summary: Pytest support for asyncio.
Package.Description: pytest-asyncio is an Apache2 licensed library, written in Python, for testing asyncio code with pytest. asyncio code is usually written in the form of coroutines, which makes it slightly more difficult to test using normal testing tools. pytest-asyncio provides useful fixtures and markers to make testing easier.

Package.Name: wmctrl
Package.Summary: wmctrl is a UNIX/Linux command line tool to interact with an EWMH/NetWM compatible X Window Manager
Package.Description: The tool provides command line access to almost all the features defined in the EWMH specification. It can be used, for example, to get information about the window manager, to get a detailed list of desktops and managed windows, to switch and resize desktops, to make windows full-screen, always-above or sticky, and to activate, close, move, resize, maximize and minimize them.

Package.Name: figlet
Package.Summary: FIGlet - display large characters made up of ordinary screen characters
Package.Description: FIGlet prints its input using large characters (called "FIGcharacters") made up of ordinary screen characters (called "sub-characters"). FIGlet output is generally reminiscent of the sort of "signatures" many people like to put at the end of e-mail and UseNet messages. It is also reminiscent of the output of some banner programs, although it is oriented normally, not sideways.

Package.Name: budgie-rotation-lock-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to lock or unlock the screen rotation
Package.Description: The Rotation Lock applet provides the user an easy way to lock or unlock the screen rotation.

Package.Name: python-setuptools-scm-git-archive
Package.Summary: setuptools_scm plugin for git archives
Package.Description: This is a setuptools_scm plugin that adds support for git archives (for example the ones GitHub automatically generates).

Package.Name: budgie-hotcorners-applet
Package.Summary: Applet providing hotcorners capabilities for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: The hotcorners applet allow user defined commands to be executed when the mouse cursor is pushed into a corner of the main desktop.

Package.Name: gti
Package.Summary: Just a silly git launcher, basically
Package.Description: Just a silly git launcher, basically. Inspired by sl.

Package.Name: budgie-workspace-overview-applet
Package.Summary: Applet providing quick access to workspaces for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: The workspace overview applet allows a user to quickly navigate workspaces using the applet's menu. Optionally, navigation to any window in any workspace is possible.

Package.Name: layan-gtk-theme
Package.Summary: Layan is a flat Material Design theme
Package.Description: Layan is a flat Material Design theme for GTK 3, GTK 2 and Gnome-Shell which supports GTK 3 and GTK 2 based desktop environments like Gnome, Budgie, etc.

Package.Name: timeshift
Package.Summary: System restore tool for Linux.
Package.Description: System restore tool for Linux. Creates filesystem snapshots using rsync+hardlinks, or BTRFS snapshots. Supports scheduled snapshots, multiple backup levels, and exclude filters. Snapshots can be restored while system is running or from Live CD/USB.

Package.Name: stylish-grub-theme
Package.Summary: Stylish grub theme
Package.Description: This is Stylish grub2 theme. Use grub-customizer to use or change the theme.

Package.Name: python-coloredlogs
Package.Summary: Colored terminal output for Python’s logging module
Package.Description: The coloredlogs package enables colored terminal output for Python’s logging module. The ColoredFormatter class inherits from logging.Formatter and uses ANSI escape sequences to render your logging messages in color. It uses only standard colors so it should work on any UNIX terminal.

Package.Name: budgie-another-trash-applet
Package.Summary: Applet allows access to trash capabilities for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: The trash applet allows the user access the desktop trash capabilities from the panel including the ability to delete and restore files stored in the trash folder.

Package.Name: bandwhich
Package.Summary: Terminal bandwidth utilization tool
Package.Description: This is a CLI utility for displaying current network utilization by process, connection and remote IP/hostname

Package.Name: wavemon
Package.Summary: Ncurses-based monitoring application for wireless network devices
Package.Description: wavemon is a wireless device monitoring application that allows you to watch signal and noise levels, packet statistics, device configuration and network parameters of your wireless network hardware. It should work (though with varying features) with all devices supported by the Linux kernel.

Package.Name: budgie-extras-daemon
Package.Summary: Extras daemon for budgie-extras capabilities
Package.Description: Budgie-Extras-Daemon provides both global keybinding and D-Bus functionality for various extras applets and applications.

Package.Name: odrive
Package.Summary: Google Drive GUI for Linux
Package.Description: This is a GUI client for Google Drive on linux application.

Package.Name: budgie-keyboard-autoswitch-applet
Package.Summary: Applet adding the ability to set a different keyboard layout per application
Package.Description: The Keyboard Auto Switcher applet provides the user the ability to set a different keyboard layout per application. Exceptions to the default layout can be set by simply choosing a different layout using the Keyboard Layout applet.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-manjaro-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: budgie-takeabreak-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to prompt when to take-a-break for a set period of time
Package.Description: The take-a-break applet monitors how long a desktop is being used and at a configurable time period suggests when to take a break from working. Options from Budgie Settings include turning the screen upside down, dim the screen, lock screen or show a countdown message on break time. The applet can be accessed quickly from the panel to temporarily switch it off.

Package.Name: budgie-recentlyused-applet
Package.Summary: Applet displays files recently accessed for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: The recentlyused applet displays the users files that have been opened or created within a configurable period of time.

Package.Name: python-injector
Package.Summary: Python dependency injection framework, inspired by Guice
Package.Description: While dependency injection is easy to do in Python due to its support for keyword arguments, the ease with which objects can be mocked and its dynamic nature, a framework for assisting in this process can remove a lot of boiler-plate from larger applications. That's where Injector can help. It automatically and transitively provides dependencies for you.

Package.Name: python-cairocffi
Package.Summary: CFFI-based cairo bindings for Python
Package.Description: cairocffi is a CFFI-based drop-in replacement for Pycairo, a set of Python bindings and object-oriented API for cairo. Cairo is a 2D vector graphics library with support for multiple backends including image buffers, PNG, PostScript, PDF, and SVG file output.

Package.Name: budgie-fuzzyclock-applet
Package.Summary: Shows the time in a Fuzzy Way
Package.Description: Displays the time in a 'spoken' format such as five past six.

Package.Name: pytest-isort
Package.Summary: py.test plugin to check import ordering using isort
Package.Description: py.test plugin to check import ordering using isort

Package.Name: budgie-clockworks-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to display clock across multiple time zones
Package.Description: A multi clock applet to show the time across multiple timezones. Clocks can be created and deleted in a single click, and easily be (re-) named. Timezones can be looked up from the applet's popup menu.

Package.Name: pdfarranger
Package.Summary: Small application to merge or split pdf documents and rotate, crop and rearrange their pages using an interactive and intuitive graphical interface
Package.Description: pdfarranger is a small python-gtk application, which helps the user to merge or split pdf documents and rotate, crop and rearrange their pages using an interactive and intuitive graphical interface. It is a frontend for python-pyPdf

Package.Name: budgie-brightness-controll-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to control the brightness of the screen
Package.Description: The brightness controller applet allows controlling of the screen levels via xrandr (fallback) or via gnome-settings-daemon (if available)

Package.Name: python-svgwrite
Package.Summary: Python Package to write SVG files
Package.Description: As the name svgwrite implies, svgwrite creates new SVG drawings, it does not read existing drawings and also does not import existing drawings, but you can always include other SVG drawings by the <image> entity.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-ubuntu-win
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: budgie-previews
Package.Summary: Provides window previews capabilities for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: Set previews to show an overview of windows in an expose like way.

Package.Name: crond
Package.Summary: crond (Dillon's lightweight cron daemon)
Package.Description: crond is a cron daemon written by Matt Dillon and continued by Jim Pryor that attempts to be as minimalist as possible.

Package.Name: budgie-window-mover-applet
Package.Summary: Applet allows moving windows between workspaces for the Budgie Desktop
Package.Description: The Window Mover applet allows the user to quickly move windows to any of the other workspaces. Just drag a window to the bottom of the screen and a bar will popup, representing the workspaces. Click on any of the numbers (or press the corresponding number on the keyboard) and the window will move to that workspace.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-manjaro
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme-ubuntu
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: vimix-grub-theme
Package.Summary: Vimix grub theme
Package.Description: This is Vimix grub2 theme. Use grub-customizer to use or change the theme.

Package.Name: gst
Package.Summary: System utility designed to stress and monitor various hardware components
Package.Description: GST (GtkStressTesting) is a GTK system utility designed to stress and monitor various hardware components like CPU and RAM.

Package.Name: numlockx
Package.Summary: Turns on the numlock key in X11
Package.Description: Turns on the numlock key in X11

Package.Name: budgie-quickchar
Package.Summary: GUI to find and choose locale characters
Package.Description: Quickly find and choose the equivalent locale character for an ascii character.

Package.Name: python-cssselect2
Package.Summary: CSS selectors for Python ElementTree
Package.Description: cssselect2 is a straightforward implementation of CSS3 Selectors for markup documents (HTML, XML, etc.) that can be read by ElementTree-like parsers (including cElementTree, lxml, html5lib, etc.)

Package.Name: qogir-gtk-theme
Package.Summary: Qogir is a flat Design theme for GTK
Package.Description: Qogir is a flat Design theme based on Arc gtk theme for Budgie, Gnome and Mate.

Package.Name: tela-grub-theme
Package.Summary: Tela grub theme
Package.Description: This is Tela grub2 theme. Use grub-customizer to use or change the theme.

Package.Name: python-cairosvg
Package.Summary: CairoSVG is a SVG converter based on Cairo
Package.Description: CairoSVG is a SVG converter based on Cairo. It can export SVG files to PDF, PostScript and PNG files.

Package.Name: budgie-dropby-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to popup when a USB device is connected
Package.Description: The DropBy applet pops up in the panel when connecting a usb device. The applet subsequently offers the option(s) to mount, unmount/eject and in case of a flash drive, to make a local copy of the drive's content. The info shows the free space on the volume.

Package.Name: bibata-cursors
Package.Summary: Material Based Cursor
Package.Description: Bibata is OpenSource, Compact and Material Designed Cursor set. This project masterelop for improve Cursor Experience. This cursor theme pack include four variants: Bibata-Amber, Bibata Classic, Bibata Ice and Bibata Oil.

Package.Name: mcmojave-cursors
Package.Summary: McMojave cursors for linux desktops
Package.Description: This is an x-cursor theme inspired by macOS and based on capitaine-cursors.

Package.Name: budgie-app-launcher-applet
Package.Summary: Applet to provide an alternative means to launch applications
Package.Description: The app-launcher applet allows the ability to add favorite apps to the panel as well as finding and launching applications. The list of applications listed can be easily configured to be visible or hidden.

Package.Name: variety-slideshow
Package.Summary: A pan-and-zoom image slideshow in Python, using Clutter
Package.Description: A pan-and-zoom image slideshow in Python, using Clutter

Package.Name: python-tinycss2
Package.Summary: Low-level CSS parser for Python
Package.Description: tinycss2 is a low-level CSS parser and generator: it can parse strings, return Python objects representing tokens and blocks, and generate CSS strings corresponding to these objects.
